fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the physical inventory order that the line exists on.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line on the physical inventory order line.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location where the item must be counted.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Bin Code of the table physical inventory order line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the description of the item.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure used for the item, for example bottle or piece.

fields.name: Base Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base unit of measure that is set up for the item.

fields.name: Qty. Expected (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected inventory quantity in the base unit of measure on the physical inventory order line.

fields.name: Use Item Tracking
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the counting of the item is done by counting its serial, lot and package numbers.

fields.name: Qty. Exp. Tracking (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's current expected inventory of serial, lot and package numbers in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Unit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of unit costs for the item quantity on the line.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's unit cost.

fields.name: No. Finished Rec.-Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many finished physical inventory recording lines exist for the physical inventory order line.

fields.name: Qty. Recorded (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Qty. Recorded (Base) of the physical inventory order line.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in the base unit of measure on the physical inventory order line.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the difference in the Quantity (Base) field on the related closed recording is positive or negative.

fields.name: Pos. Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the positive difference between the Qty. Expected (Base) and the Qty. Recorded (Base) fields.

fields.name: Neg. Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the negative difference between the Qty. Expected (Base) and the Qty. Recorded (Base) fields.

fields.name: Recorded Without Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies that no physical inventory order lines existed for the recorded item, and that the line was generated based on the related recording.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item on the physical inventory order line.
